name: io.github.FunplayAI/funplay-cocos-mcp
title: Funplay Cocos MCP
description: stdio bridge for the local Cocos Creator Editor MCP server from FunplayAI/funplay-cocos-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: FUNPLAY_COCOS_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional local Cocos MCP HTTP endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8765/.

environmentVariables.name: FUNPLAY_COCOS_MCP_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTP timeout per request in seconds. Defaults to 120.
